villainAction: Everyone folds to you in the big blind
explanation: You win the pot for free with a check. Walk and save chips.

villainAction: Button closes action with no raises
explanation: Button acts last preflop. Steal the blinds with a raise.

villainAction: Big Blind calls after you limp from the small blind
explanation: Out of position and dominated. Fold and stay ready for better spots.

villainAction: Action folds to you on the button
explanation: Button has positional advantage. Open-raise to pressure the blinds.

villainAction: You are in the big blind and everyone folds
explanation: You already invested half a blind. Check and see a free flop.
